items.md: # WALT DISNEY’S COMICS AND STORIES (Dell/Gold Key)
items.value: WALT DISNEY’S COMICS AND STORIES (Dell/Gold Key)

items.md: *Walt Disney’s Comics* was published by Western Publishing in its guise as K.K. Publications through No.328, January 1968,and was published by Western under its own name after that. *Walt Disney’s Comics* was never published by Dell, but all issues bore the Dell label from No. 93, March 1948, through
